detectors.description:

detectors.description:
Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#123-202) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:

	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#192)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Patient.addMedicalRecordsBatch(string[],string[],string[],string[],bool[]) (contracts/Patient.sol#498-529):

	- _safeMint(msg.sender,tokenId) (contracts/Patient.sol#515)
		- retval = IERC721Receiver(to).onERC721Received(_msgSender(),from,tokenId,data) (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC721/ERC721.sol#467-480)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- patients[patientId].medicalRecords.push(MedicalRecord({tokenId:tokenId,ipfsHash:ipfsHashes[i],fileName:fileNames[i],recordDate:recordDates[i],hospital:hospitals[i],isEmergencyViewable:emergencyViewable[i]})) (contracts/Patient.sol#518-527)
	Patient.patients (contracts/Patient.sol#62) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Patient.getMedicalRecords(uint256) (contracts/Patient.sol#399-407)
	- Patient.getMedicalRecordsPaginated(uint256,uint256,uint256) (contracts/Patient.sol#444-460)
	- Patient.getPatientDashboard(address) (contracts/Patient.sol#425-442)
	- Patient.getPatientDetails(uint256) (contracts/Patient.sol#371-379)
	- Patient.getPatientSummary(uint256) (contracts/Patient.sol#409-423)

	- Patient.patients (contracts/Patient.sol#62)
	- Patient.registerPatient(string,string,string,uint8,string) (contracts/Patient.sol#210-240)
	- Patient.toggleEmergencyVisibility(uint256) (contracts/Patient.sol#357-363)
